steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is Objects (plural). The modifying phrase “ranging from the Kikkoman soy sauce bottle to the Yamaha VMAX motorcycle to the Komachi bullet train” doesn't change the subject's number — Objects is the head noun controlling the verb.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb form, and were is the plural past tense that matches Objects. The other three options (was, is, has been) are all singular verb forms. That matches choice D — D is correct.
